name: Sweet, Sweet Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the potatoes well.
2. Mix mashed potatoes with 1 stick of melted butter, vanilla, 3/4 cup sugar, and eggs.
3. Pour the mixture into a long baking pan.
4. Top with brown sugar, pecans, and 1/2 cup of melted butter.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
6. Serves between 8-10 people.
